title: MC: Director's Cut
description: A vanilla+ modpack that adds some QOL tweaks, and aims to improve performance a bit
body:
**Minecraft: Director's Cut** is yet another vanilla+ and optimization pack. With just 30 mods, MC:DX boosts frames and tweaks the menus just enough to make Minecraft feel remastered, without feeling like a totally different game.
Feel free to join the discord to ask any questions you might have!
